title: daucus carota var. timbalianus
intro: Daucus carota var. timbalianus, also known as wild carrot, is a variety of the wild carrot plant, a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of furanocoumarins and other compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Wild carrot can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
